query:
-- Delete all anuncios from 2025
DELETE FROM anuncios 
WHERE YEAR(fecha_inicio) = 2025;

-- Show summary of remaining anuncios
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(fecha_inicio, '%Y-%m') as mes,
  COUNT(*) as cantidad
FROM anuncios
GROUP BY mes
ORDER BY mes;

-- Total count
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_anuncios FROM anuncios;
